item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 1h Orlando it is Cita Clevta @Clevta · 18 abr. Excluding the bubble, 10 straight years a home favorite
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 1h Orlando it is Cita Clevta @Clevta · 18 abr. Excluding the bubble, 10 straight years a home favorite of 3+ pts in gm1 of the playoffs has lost outright. Last year GS beat HOU as 3 pt dogs (+10). Avg spread has been 6.5 so not small upsets in general. Altho none were upsets of a team favored by DD. Candidates this year would 2 13 9 mil

item.title: GeorgeTsilfidis: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 1h LFG Cita Orlando Magic @OrlandoMagic · 1h GAME WON !! 2 248
item.description: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 1h LFG Cita Orlando Magic @OrlandoMagic · 1h GAME WON !! 2 248

item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 1h One more clip from Jordyn Tyson that he just posted. Looking like a human joystick:
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 1h One more clip from Jordyn Tyson that he just posted. Looking like a human joystick:
(: @tyson_jordyn ) Cita Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 1h 0:06 Arizona State WR Jordyn Tyson posted on IG this catch he made during his personal workout Friday in front of NFL teams:
(via @tyson_jordyn) 74 275 2 mil 300 mil

item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 2h In his first and only seven-round mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, @chad_reuter forecasts
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 2h In his first and only seven-round mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, @chad_reuter forecasts some Day 1 surprises and four first-round trades. See all of his projections, 1-257.
https:// nfl.com/news/seven-rou nd-2026-nfl-mock-draft-round-one … 1 2 13 13 mil
